title: Security Log Triage Output
description: Structured output contract for security log triage results.

label.description: The most likely activity or attack pattern for the log line.

severity.description: Investigation priority for the triage result.

is_suspicious.description: Whether the log should be treated as suspicious for investigation.

evidence.description: Concrete substrings or facts from the log that support the label.

reason.description: Short explanation of why the label was selected.

recommended_action.description: Next investigation action for an analyst.
